description: CompositionBlack top, made of 70% acrylic and 30% wool, has a round neck, long raglan sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, blue and green diamond-shaped pattern on the front, and has a brand badge on the left hemFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsCrafted from a soft wool blended fabric, this top from adidas is a perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. Layer it over tops and t-shirts or wear it over a spaghetti by teaming it with skirts and casual trousers, add on mocassins or sneakers and enjoy the winter in warm comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8"; Chest: 32"
